prompt: Customer says order #41327 was returned two weeks ago and the refund still has not arrived.
ideal_response: I reviewed your request about your refund request. 1. Reference: order 41327 2. Resolution: we are approving the refund back to the original payment method 3. Timeline: 3-5 business days 4. Next step: we will send a confirmation update as soon as the action is complete.

prompt: Customer says order #55210 arrived damaged and asks for a replacement.
feedback: acknowledged the issue but gave no replacement plan
ideal_response: I reviewed your request about a damaged item delivery. 1. Reference: order 55210 2. Resolution: we are sending a replacement shipment at no extra cost 3. Timeline: 1 business day 4. Next step: we will send a confirmation update as soon as the action is complete.

prompt: Customer says order #77110 has had no tracking updates for five days and asks what happens next.
ideal_response: I reviewed your request about a shipment delay. 1. Reference: order 77110 2. Resolution: we are escalating the stalled shipment to the carrier and checking the delivery scan 3. Timeline: 24 hours 4. Next step: we will send a confirmation update as soon as the action is complete.

prompt: Customer says they were charged twice for the same subscription renewal and wants the duplicate charge reversed.
ideal_response: I reviewed your request about a duplicate charge on the account. 1. Resolution: we are reversing the duplicate charge and confirming the corrected balance 2. Timeline: 2-3 business days 3. Next step: we will confirm the change once it has been applied.

prompt: Customer says they canceled last week but were still billed and wants a refund for the latest billing period.
feedback: unclear refund policy and next step
ideal_response: I reviewed your request about your refund request. 1. Resolution: we are approving the refund back to the original payment method 2. Timeline: 3-5 business days 3. Next step: we will confirm the change once it has been applied.
